Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}There are all kinds of shops here at the Iwatodai strip mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you're craving delicious food, then head to Wakatsu! There's also Hagakure, a famous ramen shop.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}You can also find dessert here, and burgers, and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Hehe, sorry, I'm just going on about food, huh. Guess it's eating time! Just kidding.[n]{f 1 1}
